name: ftp
description: Deploys static site build output to GoDaddy shared hosting via FTP using basic-ftp in Node.js and SamKirkland/FTP-Deploy-Action in CI. Use when: modifying deploy.js, troubleshooting FTP upload failures, changing remote directory structure, configuring FTP credentials in .env or GitHub Secrets, editing deploy workflows, or adding pre/post-deploy steps.
